---
title: "Observation of Simultaneous Successive Twinning Using Atomic Electron Tomography"
type: "article"
author: "P. M. Pelz, C. Groschner, A. Bruefach, C. Ophus, M. C. Scott"
year: "2023"
publication: "Microscopy and Microanalysis 29, 707-708"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.1093/micmic/ozad067.348"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - tomography
  - atomic resolution
---

## Citation (APA 7)

> Observation of Simultaneous Successive Twinning Using Atomic Electron Tomography
P. M. Pelz, C. Groschner, A. Bruefach, C. Ophus, M. C. Scott
Microscopy and Microanalysis 29, 707-708


## Abstract

[Abstract will be added manually]
